message:
fix(engine): implement proper Default for Test262WaiverSet with schema version and add missing-file test coverage

Replace the derive(Default) on Test262WaiverSet with a manual Default
implementation that populates schema_version from the
TEST262_WAIVER_SCHEMA constant. Previously, Default produced an empty
schema_version string which would fail validation — now the default is
always a valid, self-consistent waiver set.

Changes:
- Remove Default from derive list, add explicit Default::default() that
  sets schema_version to TEST262_WAIVER_SCHEMA.to_string()
- Simplify valid_waiver_set() test helper to use
  Test262WaiverSet::default()
- Add waiver_set_default_is_valid test confirming the default passes
  validation
- Add waiver_set_load_missing_file_returns_valid_default test verifying
  that load_toml() on a non-existent path returns a valid default rather
  than an error, and that the returned default passes validation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
